_meta._source: Manually digitized from the 2023 top-down spec sheets (Z:\Sales1\Sales\SPEC SHEET - TOP DOWN 2023\). One layout per booth shell shape.

_schema.exterior: Outer shell dimensions in inches (w = long axis, h = short axis). Matches the spec-sheet top-down view.
_schema.walls: Keyed by compass side: N = back, S = front (door side), E = right, W = left.
_schema.walls.<side>.slots: Ordered list of wall-panel slots running along the interior. Each slot has: id (unique), size (nominal/empty-state inches), families (LIST of acceptable wall-pack prefixes, e.g. ['STDWL46','WA STDDRFRM']; first matching wall in the BOM pool wins), prefers (ordered list of slot-kind preferences for auto-placement — VNT, CBL, DRFRM, WDO, SOLID).
_schema.walls.<side>.longSide: true for the two long walls of a rectangular booth (where panels are split wide + narrow style).

_meta._lookup: Lookup by full MDL name (e.g. 'MDL 4872 S'). Variant fallback (e.g. 'MDL 4872 E' → 'MDL 4872 S' layout) is handled in lib/packing-list.js boothLayout().
_meta._swap_handling: Narrow slots accept both the std + WA-shrunken family (e.g. STDWL22 OR STDWL19) so the WA Door substitution can flip one narrow without falling out of the wall pool. Same goes for the door slot: STDWL46 OR WA STDDRFRM. The SVG renders each placed panel at its real interior width via panelInteriorWidth().
